title: Better Forests
description: Fills Minecraft forest biomes with beautiful and varying trees.
body:
Better Forests replaces simple and repetitive vanilla forests with constantly varying ones full of many different kinds of beautiful trees. 

![](https://imagizer.imageshack.com/img923/6535/FbrVR4.png)

Sometime the trees are massive giants.

![](https://imagizer.imageshack.com/img924/7790/rfNGgs.png)

Sometimes smaller and inviting.

![](https://imagizer.imageshack.com/img923/7687/UlbpQr.png)

Sometimes stands of pure trees.

![](https://imagizer.imageshack.com/img924/6504/eeNkLk.png)

Sometimes complex mixtures.

![](https://imagizer.imageshack.com/img924/4171/zXmaC3.png)

Dense stands of trees.

![](https://imagizer.imageshack.com/img922/2197/meH2vH.png)

And open forests you can see all the way through.

![](https://imagizer.imageshack.com/img923/5282/br8xWC.png)

Spookier dark forests, that also differ from place to place in trees and in degree of darkness.

![](https://imagizer.imageshack.com/img924/8527/xqJFa3.png)

Even in the densest and grandest forest a new light tracking and planning system makes dayspawns rare (except in dark forest, of course).

![](https://imagizer.imageshack.com/img924/9245/ge5BZF.png)

Endless fresh scenery to explore and great backdrops for your builds.

All the tree styles can be hand-grown from saplings, using any vanilla tree material. Better Trees grow from groups of saplings in a 3x3 area, with the sapling in the middle determining the form and the saplings around it the materials.

Comments and suggestions warmly welcomed! [Discord forum](https://discord.gg/eqYe4Dwv)

This is now a release version. Future plans include compatibility with Fabric and NeoForge.
